title: calamagrostis extremiorientalis
intro: Calamagrostis extremiorientalis, also known as the East Asian feather reed grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Calamagrostis extremiorientalis is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in relieving pain and reducing swelling. The plant is also said to have health benefits, including reducing fever and improving respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Calamagrostis extremiorientalis can be prepared as a decoction, where the dried roots and rhizomes are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
